# Internal 10net sources (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Internal 10net sources. `incidr()` tests an IP against a CIDR (literal multi-CIDR string only — not a column).

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | filter src_ip incidr "10.0.0.0/8" | fields ts, src_ip, dst_ip
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
